query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.status,
  ROUND(CAST(p.totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2)), 2) as totalAmount,
  p.quotationId,
  CASE WHEN p.quotationId IS NULL THEN 'SIN COTIZACIÓN' ELSE 'CON COTIZACIÓN' END as tiene_cotizacion
FROM projects p
WHERE p.deletedAt IS NULL 
  AND p.dataOrigin = 'manual'
ORDER BY p.status, p.totalAmount DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.status,
  ROUND(CAST(p.totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2)), 2) as totalAmount,
  p.quotationId,
  CASE WHEN p.quotationId IS NULL THEN 'SIN COTIZACIÓN' ELSE 'CON COTIZACIÓN' END as tiene_cotizacion
FROM projects p
WHERE p.deletedAt IS NULL 
  AND p.dataOrigin = 'manual'
ORDER BY p.status, p.totalAmount DESC
